texto: Certain things are expected of you when you’re a demon. Take the grotesque bodies, for example. Powerful, lethal, but definitely not beauty pageant material. Which is why the more talented among the demon race normally reverted to a basic human form. Those that couldn’t take human form were destined to a life of servitude or as a meal on legs.
explicacao: Citação de Samantha Blake sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Certain things are expected of you when you’re a demon. Take the grotesque bodies, for example. P…” articula reflexao, demons, evander em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como estudos e evander.
